scripts.title: Birthday Party Inquiry
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking about hosting a birthday party at Akan.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! I'd love to help you plan a birthday celebration with us. May I know your name please?
key_questions: What date are you looking at for the celebration?
Approximately how many guests are you expecting?
Do you have a floor preference? Our 1st floor is the pub/band area (21+ only), while 2nd and 3rd floors are great for family celebrations.
Would you like any special arrangements like cake, decorations, or a dedicated setup?
key_info_to_share: All floors available for private bookings based on calendar.
1st floor: 400 seating / 550 standing - best for large parties (21+ only).
2nd floor: 190 seating (semi-indoor + outdoor) - family friendly.
3rd floor: 180 outdoor seating with stunning Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge view.
Custom food and beverage packages available.
Valet parking available for all guests.
scripts.closing: I'll share the details with our events team and they will get back to you with a customized proposal. Can I get your WhatsApp number to share the details?
upsell_tips: If the party falls on Friday/Saturday, mention the live band experience!
For Sunday birthdays, suggest combining with the Sunday Brunch Buffet.
Recommend the 3rd floor for the best views and photo opportunities.

scripts.title: Corporate Event Booking
scripts.scenario: Company HR or admin calls about hosting a corporate event.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! We'd be delighted to host your corporate event. We're located right next to iLabs, very convenient for IT companies.
key_questions: What type of corporate event is this? (Team outing, client dinner, annual party, conference after-party?)
What date and time are you considering?
How many attendees are you expecting?
Do you need any audio-visual setup, projector, or mic facilities?
Is this a sit-down dinner or cocktail-style event?
key_info_to_share: Located right next to iLabs Gate 7 - very convenient for IT companies.
Full 1st floor available for big corporate parties (400 seated / 550 standing).
All 3 floors available based on calendar.
Custom food and beverage packages tailored to your budget.
Valet parking available for all guests.
2nd and 3rd floor are family-friendly if team members bring families.
scripts.closing: Let me take your details and our events coordinator will get back to you within 24 hours with a customized proposal. May I have your email and WhatsApp number?
upsell_tips: Suggest combining with a weekend live band night for team outings.
Mention Sunday workshops for team-building activities (pottery, pizza making, etc.).
Highlight the 3rd floor cable bridge view for client-facing events.

scripts.title: Table Reservation
scripts.scenario: Customer wants to reserve a table for dining.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! I'd be happy to help you with a table reservation.
key_questions: For what date and time would you like the reservation?
How many guests will be dining?
Do you have a floor preference? 1st floor is our pub area (21+ only), 2nd and 3rd floors have outdoor seating with cable bridge views.
Is this for a special occasion?
key_info_to_share: We are open Sun-Thu: 12PM-11:30PM, Fri-Sat: 12PM-12:30AM.
No entry fees or cover charges on regular days.
Valet parking available.
You can also book via ReserveGo or WhatsApp.
scripts.closing: Your table is reserved! We'll send a confirmation on WhatsApp. We look forward to welcoming you!
upsell_tips: If coming on Fri/Sat, mention the live band from 9 PM.
If coming on Sunday, mention the Sunday Brunch Buffet (12-4 PM).
Recommend the 3rd floor for the best cable bridge view experience.

scripts.title: Event Night Information
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking about tonight's or upcoming events.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! Let me tell you about our exciting events.
key_questions: Are you asking about tonight specifically, or upcoming events?
How many people will be in your group?
Have you visited us before?
key_info_to_share: Friday & Saturday: Regional Telugu Live Bands from 9PM-12:30AM on the 1st floor.
Sunday: Bollywood Sufi & Qawali Bands from 9PM-11:30PM.
Sunday Brunch Buffet: 12PM-4PM with fun workshops.
Cover charges may apply only if a big performer is featured that weekend.
1st floor band area is strictly 21+ only.
Events are updated on Instagram @akan.hyd.
Event tickets available on BookMyShow.
scripts.closing: Would you like me to reserve a table for the event? We recommend booking in advance as event nights fill up quickly!
upsell_tips: Mention BookMyShow for easy ticket booking.
Suggest the 2nd or 3rd floor if they have family/underage members.

scripts.title: Complaint Handling
scripts.scenario: Customer calls with a complaint about food, service, or experience.
scripts.opening: Thank you for reaching out to Akan Hyderabad. I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you faced. Your feedback is very important to us.
key_questions: Could you share more details about your experience?
When did you visit us and which floor were you on?
May I have your name and contact number so our manager can follow up personally?
key_info_to_share: Express genuine empathy and concern - listen actively.
Do NOT argue, justify, or blame the customer.
Assure the guest that their feedback is valuable and will be acted upon.
Escalate to the duty manager immediately if the complaint is serious.
Never make promises about compensation without manager approval.
scripts.closing: I truly appreciate you bringing this to our attention. Our manager will personally reach out to you today to ensure we make this right.
upsell_tips: Do NOT upsell during complaint handling. Focus entirely on resolution.

scripts.title: Sunday Brunch & Workshop Inquiry
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking about Sunday brunch or workshops.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! Our Sunday Brunch is one of our most popular offerings. Let me share the details!
key_questions: Are you interested in just the brunch, or also one of our fun workshops?
How many adults and children will be joining?
Would you like to make a reservation for this Sunday?
key_info_to_share: Sunday Brunch Buffet: 12:00 PM - 4:00 PM every Sunday.
Adult pricing: Rs. 1,499/- + Tax (without alcohol).
Children (5-12 years): Rs. 799/- + Tax. Below 5: Complimentary.
Workshop options: Pizza Making, Mixology, Sushi Making, Glass Painting, Candle Making, Pottery - Rs. 999/- (solo) or Rs. 1,599/- (with brunch).
Leather Making workshop: Rs. 1,299/- (solo) or Rs. 1,799/- (with brunch).
scripts.closing: Shall I book a table for this Sunday's brunch? We recommend reserving early as it gets quite popular!
upsell_tips: Always recommend the workshop + brunch combo for better value.
Highlight the family-friendly nature - kids love the workshops!
Mention the 3rd floor outdoor seating with cable bridge views for brunch.

scripts.title: Vegetarian / Dietary Requirements
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking about vegetarian, vegan, Jain, or gluten-free options.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! We have a wonderful range of options for all dietary preferences.
key_questions: Are you looking for vegetarian, vegan, Jain, or gluten-free options?
How many guests and when are you planning to visit?
Would you like me to share our menu link so you can browse the options?
key_info_to_share: Extensive vegetarian menu including: Paneer Majestic, Truffle Malai Broccoli, Stuffed Paneer Tikka, Edamame Truffle Dimsum, various sushi rolls, pizzas, pastas, and Indian curries.
Veg bestsellers: Paneer Majestic, Smoked Dal Makhani, Paneer Butter Masala, Sweet Potato Apricot Tikki.
Vegan options available - several salads and dishes marked vegan. Kitchen can prepare vegan-friendly dishes on request.
Jain food available on request.
Gluten-free options marked on menu.
Menu link: akanhyd.com/menu
scripts.closing: I'm sure you'll find plenty to enjoy! Shall I reserve a table for you?
upsell_tips: Recommend Edamame Truffle Dimsum (vegan, Chef's Kiss) as a must-try.
Highlight the Smoked Dal Makhani as a crowd favorite.
Suggest the Sunday Brunch which has a wide buffet spread for all diets.

scripts.title: Underage Guest / Family with Teenagers
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking if they can bring their teenager or young family member.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! Great question - let me explain our age policy so you can plan your visit perfectly.
key_questions: How old is the youngest member in your group?
How many guests total?
Which day are you planning to visit?
key_info_to_share: 1st Floor (Pub/Band area): STRICTLY 21+ ONLY. No exceptions, even with parents.
2nd Floor & 3rd Floor: Under-21 guests allowed ONLY with parents/guardians.
Under-21 guests receive a RED WRISTBAND - they will NOT be served any alcoholic drinks.
3rd floor is fully outdoor with amazing Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge view - great for families!
2nd floor has semi-indoor and outdoor seating.
Valid government photo ID required at entry.
scripts.closing: I'd recommend the 3rd floor for your family - the view is absolutely stunning! Shall I reserve a table?
upsell_tips: Recommend 3rd floor for the view and outdoor vibe.
If visiting Sunday, suggest the brunch + workshop combo (kids love pottery/pizza making).
Mention that kids below 5 eat free at the Sunday Brunch.

scripts.title: Menu & Food Recommendation
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking what's good on the menu, or needs food recommendations.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! We have an amazing multi-cuisine menu. Let me help you pick the best dishes!
key_questions: Do you prefer vegetarian or non-vegetarian?
Any specific cuisine preference? We have Indian, Pan-Asian, Italian, Mexican, and more.
How spicy do you like your food?
Any allergies or dietary restrictions?
key_info_to_share: Crowd Favorites: Paneer Majestic, Southern Style Chicken 65, Butter Chicken, Murgh Dum Biryani, Smoked Dal Makhani.
Chef's Kiss items: Chocolate of the Gods (dessert), Angara Chicken Kebab, Tandoori Karvepaku Prawns, Edamame Truffle Dimsum.
Unique must-try: Wasabi White Chocolate Kulfi, Thandai Risotto, Bhimavaram Chicken Kaju Pakodi.
For seafood lovers: Grilled Lobster, Butter Garlic Prawns, Malvani Fish Curry, Andhra Prawn Pulao.
We have a full sushi menu, gourmet pizzas, live charcoal grill counter, and amazing desserts.
Share menu link: akanhyd.com/menu for full menu with prices.
scripts.closing: I'd love for you to try our specialties! Shall I reserve a table for you?
upsell_tips: Always recommend at least one Chef's Kiss item.
Mention the live charcoal grill counter for an interactive experience.
Suggest ending the meal with Chocolate of the Gods - it's our signature dessert.

scripts.title: Bar & Whiskey Collection Inquiry
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking about the bar, cocktails, or whiskey collection.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! We have an excellent full bar with a premium collection. Let me tell you about it!
key_questions: Are you interested in whiskey, cocktails, beer, or wine?
Is this for a personal visit or planning an event?
When are you planning to visit?
key_info_to_share: Full bar - all spirits, cocktails, mocktails, wines, beers (domestic and imported).
Premium Single Malts: Glenfiddich 12yr, Glenmorangie 10yr, Talisker 10yr, Singleton, Indri, Royal Brackla (12/18/21yr).
Blended Scotch: Johnnie Walker (Red/Black), Chivas Regal (12/15/18yr), Dewar's range (up to 21yr), Royal Salute.
Standard pour is 50ml, subject to availability.
Note: We are NOT a brewery. We serve curated premium brands.
Bar on 1st floor is 21+ ONLY. 2nd and 3rd floor bars serve adults only (red wristband for under-21).
scripts.closing: Come experience our collection! Would you like to reserve a spot? Friday/Saturday nights have live bands to complement your drinks!
upsell_tips: For whiskey enthusiasts, mention the Royal Brackla 21yr as a premium experience.
Suggest pairing drinks with our bar nibbles - Cajun Spiced Foxnut, Devil Cashewnuts.
If on Fri/Sat, mention the live band atmosphere.

scripts.title: Sushi & Pan-Asian Menu Inquiry
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking about sushi or Asian food options.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! We have a fantastic Pan-Asian menu including fresh sushi, dimsums, baos, and more!
key_questions: Are you looking specifically for sushi, or our full Pan-Asian menu?
Vegetarian or non-vegetarian preference?
How many guests?
key_info_to_share: Full sushi menu with both veg and non-veg options - Maki, Uramaki, Nigiri styles.
Veg sushi highlights: Avocado Cream Cheese Maki, Edamame Truffle Uramaki, Veg Tempura Uramaki.
Non-veg sushi: Salmon Nigiri, Aburi Salmon Nigiri, Sawagani Maki (soft shell crab), Ebi Uramaki (prawn tempura).
Dimsums: Edamame Truffle Dimsum (vegan, Chef's Kiss), Prawn Dimsum, Tibetan Chicken Dimsum.
Baos: Grilled Vegetable Bao, Spicy Thai Chicken Bao.
Also: Japanese Udon Noodles, Nasi Goreng, Thai curries, Khow Suey soups.
Sunday workshop includes Sushi Making class!
scripts.closing: Would you like to reserve a table? Our sushi is freshly prepared and very popular!
upsell_tips: Mention the Sunday Sushi Making workshop for sushi enthusiasts.
Recommend pairing sushi with our mocktails or Japanese sake.
Suggest the 3rd floor outdoor seating for a unique sushi experience with the cable bridge view.

scripts.title: Large Group / Walk-in Availability
scripts.scenario: Customer calls to check if they can walk in with a large group (8+ people).
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! We'd love to host your group. Let me check availability for you.
key_questions: How many people are in your group?
What time are you planning to come?
Is everyone above 21? (Important for 1st floor seating)
Any preference for indoor or outdoor seating?
key_info_to_share: For groups of 8+, we strongly recommend advance booking to guarantee seating together.
Walk-ins are welcome but subject to availability, especially on Fri/Sat evenings.
2nd floor: 190 capacity. 3rd floor: 180 capacity (fully outdoor).
1st floor: 400 seating but 21+ only.
Valet parking available for all guests.
You can book via phone, WhatsApp (+919649652222), or ReserveGo.
scripts.closing: Let me reserve a table for your group right now so you're guaranteed a great spot. What time works?
upsell_tips: For Fri/Sat groups, highlight the live band experience.
Suggest the 3rd floor for the best group photos with cable bridge view.
For corporate groups, mention custom food packages.

scripts.title: Parking & Directions
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking about parking or how to reach Akan.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! Let me guide you to our location.
key_questions: Where are you coming from?
Are you driving or taking a cab?
key_info_to_share: Location: Akan Hyderabad, Opp Durgam Cheruvu, Beside iLabs Gate No 7, Madhapur.
Landmark: Right next to iLabs Gate 7, opposite Durgam Cheruvu lake.
Valet parking is available - just pull up at the entrance.
For cab/auto: Tell them 'Akan restaurant near iLabs Gate 7, Madhapur' or use Google Maps.
Very accessible from Hi-Tech City, Gachibowli, and Kondapur areas.
scripts.closing: Just follow Google Maps to 'Akan Hyderabad' and our valet will take care of parking. See you soon!
upsell_tips: If they mention they're nearby IT companies, mention corporate event hosting capabilities.
Mention the stunning Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge view from the 3rd floor.

scripts.title: Date Night / Romantic Dinner
scripts.scenario: Customer calls planning a date night or special romantic dinner.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! We have the perfect ambiance for a special evening together.
key_questions: Is this for a special occasion - anniversary, proposal, or just a date night?
What day and time are you planning?
Would you prefer indoor cozy seating or outdoor with the cable bridge view?
key_info_to_share: 3rd floor: Fully outdoor with a stunning lit-up Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge view - most romantic!
2nd floor: Semi-indoor + outdoor, more intimate and cozy.
Friday/Saturday: Live Telugu bands from 9PM create amazing atmosphere.
Sunday: Bollywood Sufi & Qawali from 9PM for a soulful evening.
Special arrangements can be made for proposals/anniversaries - talk to our events team.
Signature dessert: Chocolate of the Gods - perfect for sharing!
scripts.closing: Let me reserve the best table for you with a view. Shall I also coordinate any special arrangements?
upsell_tips: Recommend the 3rd floor corner table for the best cable bridge view.
Suggest starting with cocktails, then dinner, ending with Chocolate of the Gods.
For proposals, mention that the events team can help with special decorations.

scripts.title: First-Time Visitor General Inquiry
scripts.scenario: Customer calls for the first time and wants to know everything about Akan.
scripts.opening: Welcome! Thank you for your interest in Akan Hyderabad! We're one of Hyderabad's most exciting dining destinations. Let me tell you all about us!
key_questions: What brings you to Akan - dining, drinks, events, or a celebration?
How many guests?
When are you planning to visit?
key_info_to_share: Akan is a multi-cuisine Pub + Restaurant + Event Space opposite Durgam Cheruvu.
3 floors: 1st floor (pub, 21+ only), 2nd floor (semi-indoor/outdoor), 3rd floor (fully outdoor with cable bridge view).
Multi-cuisine menu: Indian, Pan-Asian, Italian, Mexican, sushi, live grill counter, gourmet pizzas.
Full bar with premium whiskey collection, cocktails, beers, wines.
Open Sun-Thu: 12PM-11:30PM, Fri-Sat: 12PM-12:30AM.
Live bands every Fri/Sat/Sun evenings.
Sunday Brunch Buffet (12-4PM) with fun workshops.
Valet parking. Contact: +919649652222. Instagram: @akan.hyd.
scripts.closing: I'm sure you'll love the experience! Shall I reserve a table for your first visit?
upsell_tips: Recommend the 3rd floor for first-timers - the view is unforgettable.
If visiting on a weekend, highlight the live band atmosphere.
Suggest trying the crowd favorites: Murgh Dum Biryani, Butter Chicken, Paneer Majestic.

scripts.title: Takeaway / Delivery Inquiry
scripts.scenario: Customer calls asking about takeaway or home delivery options.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! Yes, we do offer takeaway and delivery.
key_questions: Would you like to pick up (takeaway) or get it delivered?
What would you like to order?
For delivery: What is your delivery address?
key_info_to_share: Takeaway: You can order via our website akanbrewingco.inmyarea.in or call us.
Delivery: Available through Swiggy and Zomato.
Full food menu available for delivery. Some items may vary.
Alcohol delivery is NOT available (as per regulations).
You can also WhatsApp your order to +919649652222.
Packaging is eco-friendly and food-safe.
scripts.closing: Shall I take your order now, or would you prefer to order online? I can share the ordering link on WhatsApp.
upsell_tips: Suggest adding desserts - Chocolate of the Gods travels well!
Recommend their bestsellers for delivery: Butter Chicken, Murgh Dum Biryani.
Mention that dining in gives the full experience - live bands, cable bridge view.

scripts.title: Difficult / Aggressive Caller
scripts.scenario: An intoxicated, angry, or aggressive caller demands entry, refund, or makes unreasonable requests.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad. I understand you're upset. Let me try my best to help you.
key_questions: Could you please share what happened?
May I have your name and the date of your visit?
Would you like me to connect you with our manager?
key_info_to_share: STAY CALM. Never raise your voice or argue back.
Use the customer's name if available - it de-escalates.
Acknowledge their frustration: 'I completely understand your frustration, sir/ma'am.'
If they're demanding entry while intoxicated: 'For everyone's safety, we have a responsibility to ensure a comfortable experience for all guests.'
If abusive: 'I want to help you, but I would appreciate if we can have a respectful conversation.'
Always offer to escalate: 'Let me connect you with our manager who can assist you better.'
NEVER make false promises or agree to refunds without manager approval.
scripts.closing: I appreciate your patience. Let me have our manager call you back to resolve this. Can I confirm your contact number?
upsell_tips: Do NOT upsell. Focus on de-escalation and resolution only.

scripts.title: WhatsApp Reservation Confirmation Call
scripts.scenario: Customer received a WhatsApp booking confirmation and calls to verify or modify it.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! I can help you with your reservation. May I have the name or booking reference?
key_questions: What name was the booking made under?
Do you want to modify the date, time, or number of guests?
Any special requests or occasion we should note?
key_info_to_share: Reservations can be made/modified via phone, WhatsApp, or ReserveGo.
Contact WhatsApp: +919649652222.
Changes are subject to availability, especially on Fri/Sat.
For cancellations, please inform at least 2 hours before.
We hold tables for 15 minutes past the reserved time.
scripts.closing: Your reservation is updated! We'll send the updated confirmation on WhatsApp. See you then!
upsell_tips: If they're upgrading guest count, suggest a larger table or floor change.
Mention any upcoming events on their booking date.

scripts.title: Cover Charge / Entry Fee Confusion
scripts.scenario: Customer calls confused about whether there's a cover charge or entry fee.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! Great question - let me clarify our entry policy for you.
key_questions: Which day are you planning to visit?
Are you asking about a specific event or general dining?
key_info_to_share: Normally, there is NO cover charge or entry fee at Akan.
Cover charges apply ONLY on special occasions - when a big-name performer is featured on Fri/Sat.
When cover charges apply, they are usually redeemable against food and beverages.
Regular Fri/Sat with house bands: NO cover charge.
Check our Instagram @akan.hyd or BookMyShow for any special event announcements.
Sunday brunch has a fixed pricing (Rs. 1,499/- + tax) but that includes the full buffet.
scripts.closing: So for your visit, there should be no cover charge unless there's a special ticketed event. Would you like me to check for your specific date?
upsell_tips: Highlight that even without a cover, they get to enjoy live bands on Fri/Sat/Sun.
Mention BookMyShow for any upcoming special events.

scripts.title: Food Allergy / Special Dietary Concern
scripts.scenario: Customer calls worried about food allergies or specific dietary needs for their group.
scripts.opening: Thank you for calling Akan Hyderabad! We take food allergies very seriously and want to ensure a safe dining experience for you.
key_questions: What specific allergies does your guest have? (Nuts, gluten, dairy, shellfish, etc.)
How many guests with dietary concerns?
When are you planning to visit?
key_info_to_share: Our menu has symbols for: Gluten Free, Vegan, Spicy, Chef's Kiss, and Crowd Fav items.
Our kitchen can accommodate most allergies with advance notice.
Nut allergies: Several dishes use cashews, peanuts, almonds - always inform your server.
Gluten-free options are available and marked on the menu.
Jain food can be prepared on request.
We recommend informing the server again when you arrive so the kitchen is prepared.
For severe allergies, speaking with our chef directly can be arranged.
scripts.closing: I'll make a note on your reservation about the allergies so our kitchen is prepared. What name and time shall I book under?
upsell_tips: Recommend specific safe dishes based on the allergy.
Suggest the Sunday brunch where the buffet display allows them to see ingredients.
